text:
injury, physiological wound caused by an external source, also known as injured, trauma, traumatic injury, injuries, wounds and injuries, physical trauma. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "damage"
- health specialty: "emergency medicine",
 "traumatology"
- Commons category: "Injuries"
- different from: "Free"
- has cause: "accident"
- has effect: "dying"
- NCI Thesaurus ID: "C3671"
- drug or therapy used for treatment: "oxycodone",
 "denosumab"
- main Wikidata property: "number of injured"
- ICPC 2 ID: "A80"
- handled, mitigated, or managed by: "injury prevention",
 "first aid"
- said to be the same as: "injury"
